name: This World is Filled with Wants
original_name: 世界はほしいモノにあふれてる
overview: Searching for splendid things with top buyers traveling the world. The documentary closely follows the buyers, and features a series of things they wants and the shops they would like to visit.

trailers.title: 世界はほしいモノにあふれてる セレクション PR動画
